svg.title: Hospital Management System — Microservices Architecture
svg.desc: Spring Boot microservices architecture with API Gateway, service registry, and 5 domain services

g.text: React / Angular SPA · Mobile · Postman / external consumers
Spring Cloud Gateway · JWT validation · Rate limiting · Routing
Logging · Audit trail · Performance monitoring · Exception handling · Role-based authorization checks

svg.text: Each service owns its database (DB-per-service pattern)

g.text: Each service · Each DB · Gateway · Eureka · Config Server — all containerised

svg.text: Auth Service — JWT, Spring Security, RBAC
User Service — Registration, role management, doctor approval
Medical Records — EHR, prescriptions, lab results
